## Collections.ConvertingResultMap.source property

A wrapper around the inner map that invalidates cache entries when mutations occur. Use this property to add, update, or delete source values.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly source: CacheInvalidatingResultMapWrapper<TK, TSRC, TTARGET, TSRCMAP>;
```
